location: Starting weapon of the Hero class. Also purchasable at any time from Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold for 800 Runes, no fight or quest needed.
tactics: Hero-class characters start with one already equipped, so buying it is only needed for other classes
Otherwise it's a straight gold purchase from Twin Maiden Husks' shop, available as soon as you first reach Roundtable Hold
Its even D/D Strength/Dexterity split and default Wild Strikes skill make it a flexible early two-hander for almost any melee build
lore: A thick, heavy-bladed axe on a sturdy handle — an unremarkable but dependable weapon that rewards putting real weight behind a swing, especially on charged attacks.

builds.name: Starting quality build
builds.why: Balanced D/D scaling in both Strength and Dexterity make it a flexible, no-commitment pick for a hybrid quality build from level one.

builds.name: Early Wild Strikes poke
builds.why: Its default Wild Strikes skill adds a fast alternating-swing combo useful for punishing openings before better Ashes of War are found.
